context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements real-time ActionCable broadcasting using Turbo Streams — using broadcasts_to or after_commit callbacks in the model, subscribing with turbo_stream_from in views, and following the proper model-driven broadcast pattern.

checklist.name: broadcasts_to in model
checklist.description: The model uses broadcasts_to (or a manual after_*_commit with broadcast_append_to / broadcast_replace_to / broadcast_remove_to) to trigger real-time updates

checklist.name: after_create_commit broadcast
checklist.description: An after_create_commit callback (or equivalent broadcasts_to with inserts_by) is present to broadcast new records to subscribers

checklist.name: after_update_commit broadcast
checklist.description: An after_update_commit callback is present to broadcast updated records (broadcast_replace_to or equivalent)

checklist.name: after_destroy_commit broadcast
checklist.description: An after_destroy_commit callback is present to broadcast record removal (broadcast_remove_to or equivalent)

checklist.name: turbo_stream_from in view
checklist.description: The view that receives real-time updates includes <%= turbo_stream_from ... %> to subscribe to the ActionCable channel

checklist.name: Matching stream channel name
checklist.description: The channel name / stream identifier in turbo_stream_from matches the one used in the model's broadcasts_to or broadcast_*_to calls

checklist.name: turbo_frame_tag for target
checklist.description: A turbo_frame_tag or a DOM element with a matching id exists in the view to serve as the target for the appended/replaced/removed stream content

checklist.name: ActionCable subscription noted
checklist.description: The implementation notes, README, or comment mentions verifying that the ActionCable subscription appears in the server log (or browser cable log) before considering setup complete

checklist.name: HTML-first fallback
checklist.description: The page loads and displays existing records without WebSocket — the real-time layer is additive, not required for initial render

checklist.name: No polling fallback
checklist.description: The implementation does NOT use JavaScript polling (setInterval, setTimeout loops) as a substitute for or alongside the ActionCable broadcast
